不知道怎么形容 [爱慕][爱慕][飞吻][飞吻] 可能是因为我看多了长篇文 短篇就觉得有点不够看了 不过这真的非常好看 有让我笑的肚子疼的 还有让我感动的 （感动啥我也忘了 ）不过祝愿他们两个人幸福吧"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1671724228,"group_id":"7125028383490051106","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"不想写简介喵喵喵喵喵喵","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N3YxX8Tnrg5fsLNpAtBa3+HGrRGx5kF8dI+aI6FulR8r","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/70357a2eb3084591b24d7c2247f947a7~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776882400&x-signature=cOM9vQ%2FqD0FhPPnIYXLu%2FHC%2BCQ4%3D","user_id":"3865483817255788","user_name":"乙葵"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"3865483817255788","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"sticker":{"expire_time":1714286973,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"","bg_color":"#E1DDFF","can_worn":false,"id":5,"name":"前排催更","small_url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/dda89d247c75fa9dfdf08a80bd508401","sticker_type":1,"url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/b9a497dac48a9ee6b81051a70c630d0f"}},"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"author","intro":"{"title_name":"作家","title_id":"author"}","is_author_title":true,"is_vip_title":false,"label":"{"title_text":"作家","title_default_color":"#FFFFFF","title_dark_color":"#FFFFFF","bg_default_color":"{\"start\":\"#FF9F31\",\"end\":\"#FFB95C\"}","bg_dark_color":"{\"start\":\"#CC8029\",\"end\":\"#CC9349\"}","title_dark_diaphaneity":"CC"}","zh_title":"作家"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7125028383490051106","book_info":{"abstract":"【双强+双男主+病娇+玄学+娱乐圈+沙雕+甜宠】
一朝车祸丧命，疯批顶流玄学大佬简燃被系统绑定，
穿入某狗血虐恋小说中当替身炮灰。 　　
于是，　　
霸道总裁A，“他回来了，我劝你今晚卷铺盖赶紧走，支票给你随便填。” 　　
简燃，“？”捉鬼镇宅这么久，终于知道付费了？！ 　　
超级男模B，“别觊觎我的八块腹肌，乞求我的怜悯，你不过一替身？！” 　　
简燃，“？”兄dei回头，跟你肩膀趴着的阿飘sayhi？ 　　
国际赛手C，“能与我并肩站在奖台上的只有他，你算个什么东西？！” 　　
简燃，“？”弯道超车注意点，怨种就在你眼前。 

娱乐圈里万人嫌，黑粉组团开麦骂翻天，绰号’简贱贱‘的千年糊咖，却另辟蹊径，靠算命上了综艺。
深山老林搞旅店，投宿客人很古怪，脸色煞白阴气重， 　　
嘉宾网友被吓得嗷嗷叫，简燃手握符篆很淡定，“嘿，终于干回老本行。”
　　
娱乐出圈玄幻大佬简哥座右铭：我天生尖酸刻薄，我不好过，谁也别想好过！

忽然一天，某位冷欲矜贵嘉宾，当晚将人摁在墙角，
嗓音磁性魅惑：“我听说了你的座右铭。” 　　
简燃，“？然后呢？” 　　
陆影帝眼眸藏匿着偏执疯狂：“我想跟你好好过。” 　　
简燃，“！你先把锁链放下！”","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/ef0767d67ccfedf14af684b2a3c4a725~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"妖精本妖","author_id":"","book_id":"7125028383490051106","book_name":"糊咖替身，捉鬼爆红","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#100810","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"1.9万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":275,"name":"双男主","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=275&name=双男主&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":29,"name":"总裁","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=29&name=总裁&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":96,"name":"甜宠","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=96&name=甜宠&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":43,"name":"娱乐圈","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=43&name=娱乐圈&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":757,"name":"现代","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=757&name=现代&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":380,"name":"病娇","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=380&name=病娇&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":382,"name":"穿书","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=382&name=穿书&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":457,"name":"虐渣","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=457&name=虐渣&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":468,"name":"冰山","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=468&name=冰山&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":478,"name":"强强","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=478&name=强强&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":486,"name":"明星","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=486&n velapp_read_item_cnt":"2.9680343e+07"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读8小时后追评"},"stat":{"digg_count":0,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":29680,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":28},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"comment_id":"7177015661028492093","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"这本书的两个主角的人设我真的都好喜欢，敢爱敢恨 怼天怼地我教主简燃 腹黑偏执 满级绿茶大影帝陆延庭
陆影帝看着小说追简燃真的好可爱啊，但是每次面对简燃的时候的算计真的好腹黑好带感，是真的绝  简燃有时候也是真的好可爱⊙ω⊙特别是面对陆影帝的时候他是把双标展现的淋漓尽致的，除了陆影帝别的人都别来沾边，简直是太可爱了但捉鬼的时候真的好飒！作者大大在这里面的捉鬼描写真的很绝让人有一种身临其境的感觉，唯一没写好的大概就是游轮上和恶魔的那场叭，一眨眼就没了，没有别的写的好（仅个人看法）"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1671029321,"group_id":"7125028383490051106","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"许你在我心上放肆 任你在我掌中撒野😉","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N9H//EToFH5EViEGGBlHDgHe+2zIx6XPCQpMX/I6MxL6","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/8015c32fc663458fa849c40d8a0455a3~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776876567&x-signature=SIhnUFsOn9p0LRYn%2BORcriQ2Vd0%3D","user_id":"2532883032968104","user_name":"槿栀芽"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"2532883032968104","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"sticker":{"expire_time":1755751626,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"活动专属","bg_color":"#E5FAF9","can_worn":false,"id":24,"name":"气氛达人","small_url":"http://p6-novel.byteimg.com/novel-static/b7c8672db629fbb3d8f83a83721675dc~tplv-noop.image","sticker_type":2,"url":"http://p6-novel.byteimg.com/novel-static/d2c24adfe48394cad03d7b1d29d70622~tplv-noop.image"}},"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7125028383490051106","book_info":{"abstract":"【双强+双男主+病娇+玄学+娱乐圈+沙雕+甜宠】

简燃，“？”兄dei回头，跟你肩膀趴着的阿飘sayhi？ 　　
国际赛手C，“能与我并肩站在奖台上的只有他，你算个什么东西？！” 　　
简燃，“？”弯道超车注意点，怨种就在你眼前。 

娱乐圈里万人嫌，黑粉组团开麦骂翻天，绰号’简贱贱‘的千年糊咖，却另辟蹊径，靠算命上了综艺。
深山老林搞旅店，投宿客人很古怪，脸色煞白阴气重， 　　
嘉宾网友被吓得嗷嗷叫，简燃手握符篆很淡定，“嘿，终于干回老本行。”
　　
娱乐出圈玄幻大佬简哥座右铭：我天生尖酸刻薄，我不好过，谁也别想好过！

忽然一天，某位冷欲矜贵嘉宾，当晚将人摁在墙角，
嗓音磁性魅惑：“我听说了你的座右铭。” 　　
简燃，“？然后呢？” 　　
陆影帝眼眸藏匿着偏执疯狂：“我想跟你好好过。”
